name: @intentsolutionsio/security-test-scanner
description: Automated security vulnerability testing covering OWASP Top 10, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and authentication issues

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install security-test-scanner\\n  or /plugin install security-test-scanner@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
